title: subworkflow - aws bedrock wait for systems manager document execution
description: Helper subworkflow that waits for AWS SSM automation executions to finish. Used by Bedrock-aware remediation workflows to enforce wait and status checks.
guide:
## Helper subworkflow that waits for AWS SSM automation executions to finish. Used by Bedrock-aware remediation workflows to enforce wait and status checks.

🧠 Wait helper for Bedrock-aware remediation and orchestration flows.

### ⚙️ Parameters
- 🌍 **awsregion**
- 🧾 **AutomationExecutionId**
- 🔌 **dynatraceawsconnection**

### 🔁 Behavior
- Polls SSM automation execution
- Retries while status is running
- Returns terminal payload for parent success validation

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Retry while automation is still running.
